   143→## Phase 2: Create usePoints Hook [CRITICAL]
   144→
   145→### 2.1 Create src/services/hooks/usePoints.ts
   146→
   147→This hook REPLACES all pointsReducer + PointsActions usage.
   148→
   149→```typescript
   150→import { useCallback } from 'react';
   151→import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
   152→import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
   153→import {
   154→  getPointsProducts,
   155→  clearPointsProducts,
   156→  getPointsBalance,
   157→  getParameterPointsProgram,
   158→} from '../services';
   159→import {
   160→  PointsProductsStatus,
   161→  PointsBalanceStatus,
   162→  ParameterPointsProgramStatus,
   163→} from '../models';
   164→
   165→export function usePoints() {
   166→  // Products from products store
   167→  const pointsProducts = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsProducts));
   168→  const { pointsProductsActions } = useRootStore.getState();
   169→
   170→  // Balance from extract store (pointsBalance)
   171→  const pointsBalance = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.pointsBalance));
   172→
   173→  // Parameterization from parameter store
   174→  const parameterPointsProgram = useRootStore(
   175→    useShallow((state) => state.parameterPointsProgram)
   176→  );
   177→
   178→  const requestInitialData = useCallback(async () => {
   179→    await Promise.all([
   180→      getPointsBalance(),
   181→      getPointsProducts(),
   182→      getParameterPointsProgram(),
   183→    ]);
   184→  }, []);
   185→
   186→  const requestPointsBalance = useCallback(async () => {
   187→    await getPointsBalance();
   188→  }, []);
   189→
   190→  const requestPointsProducts = useCallback(async () => {
   191→    await getPointsProducts();
   192→  }, []);
   193→
   194→  const requestParameterization = useCallback(async () => {
   195→    await getParameterPointsProgram();
   196→  }, []);
   197→
   198→  const clear = useCallback(() => {
   199→    clearPointsProducts();
   200→  }, []);
   201→
   202→  return {
   203→    // Balance (from extract store - pointsBalance)
   204→    points: pointsBalance.points,
   205→    isLoadingBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.LOADING,
   206→    isErrorBalance: pointsBalance.status === PointsBalanceStatus.ERROR,
   207→
   208→    // Products (from products store)
   209→    products: pointsProducts.products,
   210→    isLoadingProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.LOADING,
   211→    isErrorProducts: pointsProducts.status === PointsProductsStatus.ERROR,
   212→
   213→    // Parameterization (from parameter store)
   214→    pointsQuantity: parameterPointsProgram.pointsQuantity,
   215→    conversionFactor: parameterPointsProgram.conversionFactor,
   216→    isLoadingParameterization:
   217→      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING,
   218→    isErrorParameterization:
   219→      parameterPointsProgram.status === ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR,
   220→
   221→    // Actions
   222→    requestPointsBalance,
   223→    requestPointsProducts,
   224→    requestParameterization,
   225→    requestInitialData,
   226→    clear,
   227→  };
   228→}
   229→```
